name: getDefaultSparqlPrefixesStr
description: Builds a `PREFIX key: <uri>` string for every prefix declared in

name: insertTriples
description: Inserts triples into a source's named graph (or an explicit `options.graphUri`). Each

params.name: sourceLabel
params.description: Source name whose graph receives the triples (may be null if `options.graphUri` is set)

properties.name: graphUri
properties.description: Target graph URI when no `sourceLabel` is given

properties.name: sparqlPrefixes
properties.description: Prefix map used to expand prefixed names before insertion

properties.name: getSparqlOnly
properties.description: Return the generated INSERT query instead of executing it

name: deleteTriplesWithFilter
description: Deletes triples from a source's graph matching a SPARQL filter expression

params.name: sourceLabel
params.description: Source name whose graph is edited

params.name: filter
params.description: SPARQL filter expression selecting the triples to delete; empty deletes all (after confirmation)

name: copyGraph
description: Copies all triples from a source's graph into another graph using paginated

params.name: fromSourceLabel
params.description: Source name whose graph is the copy origin

name: getDistinctPredicates
description: Lists the distinct predicates used in a source, with their optional labels. Runs

name: copyNodes
description: Copies selected nodes (and their properties) from a source into a target graph, optionally

params.name: fromSourceLabel
params.description: Source name the nodes come from

params.name: sourceIds
params.description: URIs of the nodes to copy

properties.name: keepOriginalUris
properties.description: Reuse source URIs instead of minting new ones

properties.name: addExactMatchPredicate
properties.description: Add an exactMatch/sameAs link back to the source node

properties.name: setParentNode
properties.description: `{sourceUri, targetUri}` to attach a parent (broader/subClassOf) link

properties.name: properties
properties.description: Only copy these property URIs

properties.name: excludedProperties
properties.description: Skip these property URIs

properties.name: additionalTriplesNt
properties.description: Extra N-Triples strings to insert

properties.name: setSubjectFn
properties.description: Hook to mutate each item's subject

properties.name: setPredicateFn
properties.description: Hook to mutate each item's predicate

properties.name: setObjectFn
properties.description: Hook to mutate each item's object

name: sortBindings
description: Sorts SPARQL result bindings in place by the string value of a given field (missing

name: setMissingLabels
description: Fills missing `<field>Label` cells in result bindings by deriving a label from the

params.name: bindings
params.description: Result bindings to enrich in place

params.name: _fields
params.description: Variable name(s) whose labels to backfill

name: setBindingsOptionalProperties
description: Backfills missing `<field>Type` and `<field>Label` cells for a family of indexed fields

params.name: bindings
params.description: Result bindings to enrich in place

params.name: _fields
params.description: Base variable name(s); indexed variants 0–4 are processed

properties.name: noType
properties.description: Do not add `<field>Type` cells

properties.name: type
properties.description: Type URI to use instead of the default `skos:Concept`

name: getLangFilterStr
description: Builds a SPARQL language filter that keeps a variable's literals in the requested

properties.name: lang
properties.description: BCP-47 language code to keep (alongside untagged literals); no filter emitted when absent

params.name: variable
params.description: SPARQL variable expression (including `?`) the filter applies to

name: getSourceTaxonomy
description: Builds the complete subsumption taxonomy (class/concept hierarchy) of a source as a flat

params.name: sourceLabel
params.description: Source name whose taxonomy is built

properties.name: ids
properties.description: Restrict to these subject URIs (adds a `setFilter` clause)

properties.name: filter
properties.description: Extra SPARQL filter appended to the hierarchy query

properties.name: parentType
properties.description: Parent predicate to use when the schema type is unrecognised

properties.name: withoutImports
properties.description: Exclude imported graphs from the `FROM` clause

name: createDecapitalizedLabelTriples
description: For every item whose preferred label is capitalised, inserts a `skos:altLabel` triple

name: triplesToTurtle
description: Stub intended to serialise an array of triples into Turtle (not yet implemented).
